description: MercoTrace root – scripts for test report generation

scripts.report:spotbugs:server: cd server && ./mvnw spotbugs:check -q && cd .. && node scripts/generate-spotbugs-report.js server/target/spotbugsXml.xml server/target/spotbugs-report.html 'SpotBugs Security Report'
scripts.report:sast:client: cd client && npx eslint src --format json -o test-results/sast-report.json 2>/dev/null; cd .. && node scripts/generate-eslint-report.js client/test-results/sast-report.json client/test-results/sast-report.html 'ESLint SAST Report'
scripts.report:sast:all: npm run report:spotbugs:server && npm run report:sast:client
